raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I requested a balance transfer check for {$4500.00}. I never received the check. Despite multiple calls reporting non-receipt, the amount was charged to my account. On XX/XX/year>, I was finally provided a copy of the check, which was clearly forged and made payable to an unknown third party. This is fraud. 

The credit card company has failed to provide written confirmation of any investigation despite repeated promises. I am requesting immediate removal of the {$4500.00} charge, along with all associated fees and interest, and written confirmation of the resolution
